series_metadata.series_description: Contains agency number, spirituous liquor brand number, date, number of bottles, adjustment requested and reason. Used to adjust inventory for bottles not salable. Used to file claims against vendor for concealed damage and pilferage. (fna 386)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area for 1 year, then destroy, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Paper: Recycle
